CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JOSEPH SACRA- MENTO AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 3320 BALBOA ST, S.F, CA. - $975 RENT & DAMAGES - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & FEES - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 6-7-94 - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVIC- TION - DEFS. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - PL. TO RETAIN ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES & PL. RETAINS SEC. DEP. W/ANY INTEREST THAT ACCRUED - PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN CLEAN CON- DITION. IF DEFS. UPHOLD THIS AGREEMENT, PL. WILL S/A & DISM. THIS ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE ALL APPROP. DOCU- MENTS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, CASSIE AS TO DEFENDANT FANILLY, BOB N. YONKO, LISA DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANILLY, BOB N. YONKO, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3320 BALBOA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $975.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $975.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMM. BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 6/7/94 MIDNIGHT SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER DETAILS
